mapper.sql: select resource_id, resource_name, resource_type, category_id, file_url, file_path, file_size, file_format, thumbnail_url, width, height, duration, tags, description, metadata_json, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from digital_resource
mapper.insert: insert into digital_resource ( resource_name, resource_type, category_id, file_url, file_path, file_size, file_format, thumbnail_url, width, height, duration, tags, description, metadata_json, status, create_by, create_time, remark, del_flag ) values ( #{resourceName}, #{resourceType}, #{categoryId}, #{fileUrl}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileFormat}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{width}, #{height}, #{duration}, #{tags}, #{description}, #{metadataJson}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark}, '0' )
mapper.update:
update digital_resource set del_flag = '1' where resource_id in
#{resourceId}
update digital_resource set del_flag = '1' where resource_id = #{resourceId}
